message:
fix(tests): add missing disk-pressure feature gate + rustfmt pass on test files

- Add #![cfg(feature = "disk-pressure")] to proptest_disk_pressure.rs
  (was missing, would fail to compile without the feature flag)
- Fix rustfmt formatting in pool_labruntime.rs and retry_labruntime.rs
- Include new test suites from other agents: events_labruntime,
  proptest_mcp_client, proptest_robot_envelope, sharding_labruntime

Validated: cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy (default, subprocess-bridge,
disk-pressure, vendored), cargo fmt --check — all pass clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
